tracks.rawText: 0:58Studio Selectionv4.5-allCoverQuiero un **vals orquestal en 3/4**, tempo moderado (~95 BPM), **cuerdas protagonistas**, atmósfera **melancólica y cinematográfica**, melodía circular y elegante, con **acentos claros en el primer tiempo** de cada compás, Sonido amplio, dramático pero contenido, con un motivo principal reconocible y desarrollo progresivo, Instrumental1PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 0:56[Rec] Feb 19 06:20:29UploadA whimsical and rhythmic a cappella vocal performance featuring a male baritone voice, The track is characterized by a repetitive, melodic humming and scat-singing structure, It begins with a mid-tempo, folk-like melody in a major key, utilizing smooth legato humming, This transitions into a faster, rhythmic section featuring percussive scat syllables like 'tan-tan-da-da' to create a sense of momentum, The production is dry and intimate with minimal reverb, focusing on the natural timbre and breath of the vocalist, The structure follows a repetitive A-B pattern where the melodic humming is followed by the rhythmic scatting, repeated twice, The tempo is approximately 110 BPM, shifting into a double-time feel during the scat sectionsPublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] Feb 19 06:20:29
